statement: Readiness as shared card-system feature — Readiness should be a shared feature across all cards, but readiness means something different at each level. Cards must never disagree about whether something is ready. — All cards display readiness state. Phase readiness depends on child actions/tasks; action readiness depends on child tasks; task readiness depends on required fields and explicit Not Needed values. Cards must receive readiness from centralized validation/readiness helpers and must not compute it independently.
affected_modules: src/rules/validation.rules.ts; readiness checker; card readiness props
